email_identity.subject: Confirm Your Mashreq Email Now For Your Security (MOVE TO INBOX)

domain_age.note: Domains under 180 days are considered high risk

llm_analysis.summary: Email exhibits brand impersonation, authentication failures, and suspicious content
llm_analysis.authentication: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC all failed, indicating a potential spoofing attempt and lack of email authentication
llm_analysis.sender: The sender domain digitalmashreq.mg.tdi.tc does not match the expected domain of a legitimate Mashreq organization, suggesting brand impersonation
llm_analysis.threat_intel: The sender IP has a high AbuseIPDB score and OTX threat reports, indicating potential malicious activity, while the domain age is unknown and SSL certificate status is unclear
llm_analysis.content: The email body contains urgent language and a suspicious title, potentially aiming to create a sense of urgency and fear, typical of phishing tactics
llm_analysis.conclusion: Based on the authentication failures, brand impersonation, and suspicious content, this email is likely a phishing attempt aimed at stealing credentials or sensitive information
